references.hebrew: וְנָתַ֧ן אַהֲרֹ֛ן עַל־שְׁנֵ֥י הַשְּׂעִירִ֖ם גֹּרָל֑וֹת גּוֹרָ֤ל אֶחָד֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה וְגוֹרָ֥ל אֶחָ֖ד לַעֲזָאזֵֽל׃
references.english: and he shall place lots upon the two goats, one marked for G<small>OD</small> and the other marked for Azazel.
One who strikes their father or mother shall be put to death.
One who fatally strikes another shall be put to death.

references.hebrew: וַעֲשִׂ֣יתֶם ל֔וֹ כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר זָמַ֖ם לַעֲשׂ֣וֹת לְאָחִ֑יו וּבִֽעַרְתָּ֥ הָרָ֖ע מִקִּרְבֶּֽךָ׃
references.english: you shall do to the one as the one schemed to do to the other. Thus you will sweep out evil from your midst;
